trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: Player has just arrived at the Bureau

environment: Fluorescent lights hum above a corridor that always feels a little too clean. Glass doors reflect your face back at you—calm on the surface, tense underneath. The air smells of copier toner and cold metal. Somewhere beyond the staff-only doors, a ventilation fan stutters, and for a moment the building feels less like an office and more like a machine swallowing secrets.

interactive_environment_objects.name: Confidential Document
interactive_environment_objects.description: A sealed confidential document assigned to the player for delivery.

current_topic: Receive a confidential document and the delivery mission

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: First formal meeting; Haruko assigns the player a task.
First meeting; Chou Hu evaluates the player while receiving the delivery.

interactive_npc.name: Haruko
interactive_npc.goal: Assign the player to deliver the confidential document to Chou Hu. The player must figure out where Chou Hu is on their own.

knowledge: Haruko is the player's boss
The document must be delivered
Chou Hu is the recipient

interactive_npc.name: Chou Hu
interactive_npc.goal: Receive the confidential document and test the player's attitude and reliability.

knowledge: He is expecting a Bureau delivery
The confidential document is meant for him

scene_end_state_reference.end_condition1: The player receives the confidential document and leaves to start the mission
scene_end_state_reference.end_condition2: The player refuses or repeatedly derails the conversation
scene_end_state_reference.goal_achievement: Player receives the confidential document and starts Task 0

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: The player accepted the confidential document.

trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: Player needs to find Chou Hu's location

environment: The main street looks ordinary at first—shop signs, crosswalk lines, delivery scooters weaving through traffic. But the longer you stand still, the more the details feel slightly off: a storefront that never opens, a shadow that doesn’t match the sun, a faint incense note slipping between car exhaust and fried food. People pass you with practiced indifference, as if everyone has agreed not to notice what’s hiding in plain sight.
current_topic: Ask around to locate Chou Hu

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: Locals hesitate but may share gossip if approached carefully.

interactive_npc.name: Street Locals
interactive_npc.goal: Respond cautiously; if the player asks properly, reveal that Chou Hu can be found at the Teahouse.

knowledge: Chou Hu is a local figure
People avoid talking about him directly
Teahouse is where he is usually seen

scene_end_state_reference.end_condition1: The player learns the Teahouse location and unlocks it on the map
scene_end_state_reference.end_condition2: The player shows bad attitude and gets nothing
scene_end_state_reference.goal_achievement: Teahouse location is revealed and unlocked

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: The player obtained Chou Hu's location (Teahouse) and unlocked it on the map.

trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: Teahouse is unlocked and the player still has the confidential document

environment: The teahouse is warm and dim, wrapped in steam and low conversation. Porcelain cups clink softly, and the smell of roasted leaves settles into your clothes. People here don’t stare—but they watch, the way locals watch a stranger who asks the wrong question. In the back, a half-drawn curtain suggests a room where private talks happen without raising voices.
current_topic: Deliver the confidential document to Chou Hu

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: First meeting; Chou Hu evaluates the player while receiving the delivery.

interactive_npc.name: Chou Hu
interactive_npc.goal: Receive the confidential document and test the player's attitude and reliability.

knowledge: He is expecting a Bureau delivery
The confidential document is meant for him

scene_end_state_reference.end_condition1: The player hands over the confidential document and completes the delivery
scene_end_state_reference.end_condition2: The player refuses to hand it over and leaves
scene_end_state_reference.goal_achievement: Task 0 completed: Chou Hu obtains the confidential document

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: Chou Hu obtained the confidential document and the player completed Task 0.

trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: After delivering the confidential document, the player returns to the Bureau

environment: Back under the fluorescent lights, the Bureau feels colder than before. Paperwork moves quietly from hand to hand. The place runs on routine, and routine has a way of making even strange errands look normal on record.

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: Player returns to report completion of Haruko's assignment.

interactive_npc.name: Haruko
interactive_npc.goal: Confirm the document has been delivered and close out the task formally.

knowledge: The player was assigned a delivery task
Chou Hu should have received the document by now

scene_end_state_reference.end_condition1: The player completes the report and closes Day 1
scene_end_state_reference.goal_achievement: Delivery report is completed; Haruko's favor increases

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: The player reported the delivery completion to Haruko.
Haruko's favor increased after the player followed procedure.

trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: Day 2 begins and Task 1 is activated

environment: A new case begins. The city feels the same, but your work doesn’t. More locations become relevant, and the sense of time pressure becomes harder to ignore.
current_topic: Unlock investigation locations and begin searching for information

scene_end_state_reference.end_condition1: Player chooses where to investigate first
scene_end_state_reference.goal_achievement: Locations unlocked: Hospital, Teahouse, Main Street, Medicine Shop

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: Player unlocked Hospital, Teahouse, Main Street, Medicine Shop.

trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: Player goes to the hospital to investigate missing body records

environment: The hospital is bright in the wrong way—white walls, white floors, white noise. Disinfectant bites at the back of your throat. Nurses move fast, eyes trained on screens instead of faces. Somewhere down the hall, an elevator dings, and you can’t shake the sense that some names are missing from the records—and no one wants to say why.

interactive_environment_objects.name: Missing Body Ledger
interactive_environment_objects.description: A list of missing bodies and mismatched records.

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: Staff hesitates when asked about missing records.

interactive_npc.name: Hospital Staff
interactive_npc.goal: Avoid trouble; provide limited access unless the player handles the conversation carefully.

knowledge: Some records are inconsistent
People have been asking questions lately

scene_end_state_reference.end_condition1: The player obtains the Missing Body Ledger
scene_end_state_reference.end_condition2: The player fails to get the ledger today
scene_end_state_reference.goal_achievement: Player obtains the missing body ledger (Task 1 Step 1)

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: The player obtained the Missing Body Ledger.

trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: Player has the Missing Body Ledger and investigates leads on Main Street

environment: The street stays busy, but the air feels watchful. People talk in half-sentences, and the moment you mention names, their expressions tighten and slide away.
current_topic: Track leads from the missing body ledger (Main Street branch)

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: The player asks about ledger-related names and dates.

interactive_npc.name: Street Locals
interactive_npc.goal: Share vague rumors if the player is careful; otherwise shut down the conversation.

knowledge: There are strange rumors recently
Some familiar faces look 'wrong'

scene_end_state_reference.end_condition1: Player gets enough hints to continue this branch
scene_end_state_reference.goal_achievement: Branch progress: Main Street investigation advanced

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: Player advanced the Main Street branch based on the missing body ledger.

trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: Player has the Missing Body Ledger and investigates leads at the Teahouse

environment: Steam curls over cups and faces. A laugh rises from one table and dies fast when you step closer. The teahouse is social on the surface, but information here is traded carefully—like tea that burns if you sip too quickly.
current_topic: Track leads from the missing body ledger (Teahouse branch)

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: The player asks about ledger-related names inside the teahouse.

interactive_npc.name: Teahouse Regulars
interactive_npc.goal: Hint at strange sightings if the player builds trust; otherwise keep silent.

knowledge: Rumors circulate here quickly
Some people seen here don't seem fully themselves

scene_end_state_reference.end_condition1: Player gets enough hints to continue this branch

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: Player advanced the Teahouse branch based on the missing body ledger.

trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: Player has the Missing Body Ledger and investigates leads at the medicine shop

environment: The shop is quiet, amber-lit, and heavy with the scent of dried herbs. It feels like a place where time slows down—until you remember why you came, and the stillness becomes pressure.
current_topic: Track leads from the missing body ledger (Medicine Shop branch)

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: First serious exchange; Huang listens more than he speaks.

interactive_npc.name: Huang Qiye
interactive_npc.goal: Respond carefully; provide limited guidance without exposing too much.

knowledge: He has heard rumors about unusual cases
He is cautious around the Bureau

scene_end_state_reference.end_condition1: Player gets enough hints to continue this branch
scene_end_state_reference.goal_achievement: Branch progress: Medicine Shop investigation advanced

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: Player advanced the medicine shop branch based on the missing body ledger.

trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: Player follows the Main Street branch and confirms revival signs

environment: Between the rush of footsteps and traffic, you notice someone moving wrong—alive, breathing, but empty in the eyes. They pause as if listening to instructions only they can hear.

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: The player approaches and tries to confirm their identity.

interactive_npc.name: Revived Individual
interactive_npc.goal: Respond slowly and vaguely; reveal dulled cognition and odd memory gaps.

knowledge: They cannot clearly explain what happened
Their memory feels incomplete

scene_end_state_reference.end_condition1: Player confirms revival signs on Main Street
scene_end_state_reference.end_condition2: Player fails to confirm anything solid

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: Player learned the truth: revival signs exist on Main Street.

trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: Player follows the Teahouse branch and confirms revival signs

environment: A patron sits too still, fingers wrapped around a warm cup as if using it to remember what warmth is. When you speak, their response arrives a beat late—soft, blank, almost rehearsed.

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: The player tries to verify the person matches the missing ledger.

interactive_npc.name: Revived Individual
interactive_npc.goal: Show subtle memory loss and strange calm; fail to recall key personal details.

knowledge: They forget recent moments easily
They cannot explain why their record says they are dead

scene_end_state_reference.end_condition1: Player confirms revival signs in the Teahouse

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: Player learned the truth: revival signs exist in the Teahouse.

trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: Player follows the medicine shop branch and confirms revival signs

environment: In the amber light, the quiet feels heavier. Someone sits in the shop with an unsettling stillness, and the air turns cold in a way that doesn’t match the weather outside.

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: Huang reacts carefully as the player notices something abnormal.

interactive_npc.name: Huang Qiye
interactive_npc.goal: Stay guarded; acknowledge something is wrong without revealing too much.

knowledge: He recognizes the signs of something unnatural
He does not want trouble brought to his shop

scene_end_state_reference.end_condition1: Player confirms revival signs near the medicine shop
scene_end_state_reference.end_condition2: Player leaves without a solid conclusion

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: Player learned the truth: revival signs exist near the medicine shop.

trigger_conditions.additional_conditions: At least 2 of WS_D2_REVIVAL_MAINST_CONFIRMED / WS_D2_REVIVAL_TEA_CONFIRMED / WS_D2_REVIVAL_SHOP_CONFIRMED are true

environment: Different places, same wrong feeling. The pattern is no longer a rumor—something is bringing the dead back, and the city is pretending it’s normal.

scene_end_state_reference.goal_achievement: Player confirms the core truth: revival signs are real

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: Player confirmed the truth: bodies are being revived.

environment: The Bureau’s routine doesn’t change, even when the content does. Under the lights, you try to turn something impossible into something reportable.

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: Haruko receives the player's findings and measures their usefulness.

interactive_npc.name: Haruko
interactive_npc.goal: Acknowledge the finding and push the player to continue fast; keep control over the situation.

knowledge: The player has confirmed something abnormal
Time is limited

scene_end_state_reference.goal_achievement: Success settlement completed (revival report generated as worldstate)

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: A revival report was generated after confirming the revival truth.

environment: You return with fragments instead of conclusions. The Bureau still wants answers. Under the fluorescent lights, silence reads like failure.

npc_relationships.recent_interaction: Haruko is dissatisfied with the lack of progress.

interactive_npc.name: Haruko
interactive_npc.goal: Pressure the player and signal displeasure; demand progress.

knowledge: The player did not confirm revival truth today
Time pressure is increasing

scene_end_state_reference.goal_achievement: Failure settlement completed; Haruko's favor decreases

worldstate_tasks.expected_text: Haruko's favor decreased due to insufficient findings.
